template_vars.Body:
From: announcements@acme.com
Date: 2026-04-10T15:22:00Z

Hi team,

We're delighted to announce Sarah Jones's promotion to VP of Sales, effective April 10. Sarah has been leading our marketing-to-sales transition and has earned this step up. Please join me in congratulating her.

Cheers,
Acme HR
